name: gbrain #380: put --file should be real and unknown op flags should fail early
summary: For gbrain issue 380 / PR 829, gbrain put now supports file <path by reading markdown content into the existing put page content param before connecting to the DB. Shared operation CLI parsing now rejects unknown flags b

name: gbrain #394: dream JSON dry runs must not mix human stdout
summary: When gbrain dream runs the embed phase with json, call runEmbedCore with quiet:true so stdout remains one JSON document even for dry run stale chunks. Keep standalone gbrain embed human summaries unchanged. Regression: t

name: gbrain #430: mixed-case slugs must be canonicalized before import writes
summary: For gbrain issue 430 / PR 828, importFromContent must validateSlug the slug before existing page lookup and all transaction writes. Otherwise putPage writes the lowercase slug but later tx calls like upsertChunks can que

name: gbrain #485: check-backlinks positional dir parsing
summary: For gbrain issue 485 / PR 825, check backlinks supports documented positional dir for both check and fix. The CLI previously only honored dir and otherwise scanned '.', so running from a parent directory could walk unrel

name: gbrain #486: check-update npm fallback
summary: For gbrain issue 486 / PR 826, check update should not depend only on GitHub releases because npm/bun installs may have package versions even when GitHub releases has no latest release. fetchLatestRelease now tries GitHu

name: gbrain #693: doctor --json should suppress implicit progress
summary: For gbrain issue 693 / PR 824, plain gbrain doctor json must keep machine readable mode quiet on stderr; only explicit progress json doctor json should emit structured JSONL progress. The fix centralizes doctor progress

name: gbrain #709: Astro files need code sync coverage
summary: For gbrain issue 709 / PR 823, Astro single file components are code inputs. Add .astro to src/core/sync.ts CODE EXTENSIONS, map detectCodeLanguage .astro to html in src/core/chunkers/code.ts, and keep code reference ext

name: gbrain #806: MCP array schemas need items
summary: For gbrain issue 806 / PR 819, MCP facing operation params with type array must declare an items schema because strict OpenAI compatible tool validators reject arrays without items. extract facts.entity hints is an array

name: gbrain #813: git submodule flag placement
summary: For gbrain issue 813 / PR 818, git accepts no recurse submodules as a clone/pull subcommand option, not as a top level git option. Keep SSRF c config flags before clone/pull, but place subcommand flags after the clone or

name: MCP server module can be imported
operations generate valid MCP tool definitions
accepts an arbitrary Operation subset (for subagent tool registry)
every def has object inputSchema with properties + required array
output equals pre-extraction inline mapping byte-for-byte
every operation has a unique name
every required param has a type
